pages.raw_text:
If plans now being perfected are
carried out by the Washington Water
Power company the amount of power
developed in and about Spokane will
be increased from $4,000 to 100000
horse power. This means the full de-
velopment of the power in the city of
Spokane, an increase to five times the
present capacity and the production of
10000 horse power at Post falls.


Clemens Herschel, an eminent by.
draulic engineer from the east, is now
in this city developing plans for the
improvement. Herschel was formerly
consulting engineer for the Niagara
Falls Power company. He is working
at Post falls at the present time, and
is drawing 500 day for his services.


The power at Post falls will be de-
veloped Immediately to half its ulti-
mate capacity These improvements
completed the power in Spokane will
be developed to 10000 horse power.
This work will take several years
more.


These improvements will mean IN
expenditure of $l,00O,000 to 81 800, 900.
Upon their completion the Washington
Water Power company will have avail
able more power than both Tacoma
and Seattle. This power will be con-
sumed in great measure in mining
and manufacturing enterprises.


A prominent business man said yes
terday that when this power was avail
able for manufacturing purposes the
city would be given freight rates, but
this is questionable


One of the contemplated uses of the
additional power is in running electric
cars to Medical Lake, whittier the
Washington Water Power company
have decided to extend their lines.
There is constantly increasing de-
mand in the Occur d'Alenes and in
this city and more power will soon oe
necessity.
